items.text: Initial Diagnosis: Self-diagnosis performed after the EPS warning light comes on with the ignition in ON mode and before the engine is started and the EPS warning light goes out.
Continuous diagnostics: Self-diagnostics that continue from the time the EPS warning light goes off until the ignition is turned to the OFF (LOCK) mode.
When performing diagnostics, be sure to check the "Troubleshooting Procedure" and follow the troubleshooting procedure.
When conducting test drives, the driver must comply with all laws and regulations, observe good manners, and drive in accordance with the surrounding conditions.

rows.text: Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more After IG voltage is above 10V and continues for 5 seconds Typical Methods:. 1. Turn ignition to ON mode.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
Steering speed feedback control stopped EPS function assist continued (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
Internal failure of EPS motor Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)

Disconnection or poor contact between steering column/EPS control unit and EPS motor terminals (M+, M- lines) Internal failure of EPS motor Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Typical Methods:. 1. Wait at least 6 seconds after turning the ignition to ON mode. 2. Start the engine. 3. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist not started or function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
Internal failure of EPS motor Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Power supply to the torque sensor (no disconnection, etc.) Typical Methods:. 1. Wait at least 6 seconds after turning the ignition to ON mode. 2. Start the engine. 3. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (torque sensor)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Power supply to the torque sensor (no disconnection, etc.) Typical Methods:. 1. Wait at least 6 seconds after turning the ignition to ON mode. 2. Start the engine. 3. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (torque sensor)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Power supply to the torque sensor (no disconnection, etc.) Typical Methods:. 1. Wait at least 6 seconds after turning the ignition to ON mode. 2. Start the engine. 3. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (torque sensor)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more Fail-safe relay must be ON Typical Methods:. 1. Wait at least 6 seconds after turning the ignition to ON mode. 2. Start the engine. 3. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (torque sensor)
Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 1 second after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)

Disconnection, ground fault or poor contact of cord between steering column/EPS control unit and relay box (+B EPS line) Blown fuse (relay box No. A3-2 (40A)) EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)

Common conditions:. Other DTCs not detected Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. In a stopped vehicle, the engine speed must be 2,500 rpm or higher and the steering wheel must be turned 180° or more to the right or left and held for 30 seconds or more. (Within 5 minutes after ignition ON mode, engine speed 4,000 rpm The above test is performed above)
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS Function Assist Continuation (Alternate Assist) (Returns if the vehicle speed signal is normal while driving)

Disconnection or poor contact of cord between steering column/EPS control unit and PGM-FI ECU (F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L lines) PGM-FI ECU program is not up-to-date EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure of PGM-FI ECU Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)
Common conditions:. Idling Not in stop Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine and wait at least 5 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on

Ground fault in code between EPS control unit and PGM-FI ECU (F-CAN_H, F-CAN_L lines) EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)
Common conditions:. Idling Not in stop Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 60 seconds after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist continues (alternative assist) or idling stop is prohibited (depends on case) (Returned if F-CAN signal is received normally)

Disconnection or poor contact of cord between steering column/EPS control unit and PGM-FI ECU (F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L lines) PGM-FI ECU program is not up-to-date EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure of PGM-FI ECU Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)

Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage of 10V or more After IG voltage is above 10V and continues for 5 seconds Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 60 seconds after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
Steering speed feedback control stopped EPS function assist continues (returns if normal at next ignition ON mode)

Disconnection or poor contact of cords between steering column/EPS control unit and VSA modulator control unit (F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L lines) VSA Modulator Control Unit program is not up-to-date VSA Modulator Internal circuit failure in the control unit Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)

Common conditions:. Battery voltage is 10V or higher After IG voltage is above 10V and continues for 5 seconds Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 60 seconds after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
Steering speed feedback control stopped EPS function assist continues (returns if normal at next ignition ON mode)

Disconnection of cord between steering column/EPS control unit and rudder angle sensor, poor contact (F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L lines) Rudder angle sensor program is not up-to-date Failure of rudder angle sensor Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)
Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Turn the steering wheel a few revolutions to the left or right, then turn the wheel fully to the left or right and hold for at least 10 seconds.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (If it is normal in the next ignition ON mode, it will be restored.)
EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (Returned after completion of EPS control unit program rewriting)
EPS control unit program rewrite incomplete
Common conditions:. Fail-safe relay must be ON Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 5 seconds after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (Returned when the fail-safe relay contact voltage inside the EPS control unit is 10 V or more)

Disconnection or ground fault of the cord between the steering column/EPS control unit and the relay box, Poor contact (+B EPS line) Blown fuse (relay box No. A3-2 (40A)) Defective 12V battery EPS control unit program is not up-to-date Internal circuit failure in steering column/EPS control unit (EPS control unit)
Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 1 second after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (Returned when the fail-safe relay contact voltage inside the EPS control unit is 17.5V or less)
High-voltage power supply connection A.C. generator failure
Common conditions:. Fail-safe relay must be ON Typical Methods:. 1. Start the engine. 2. Wait at least 1 second after the EPS warning light goes off.
1 drive cycle EPS warning light: on
EPS function assist stopped (Returned when the fail-safe relay contact voltage inside the EPS control unit is 17.5V or less)
DC-DC converter failure High-voltage power supply connection A.C. generator failure
